subject: test: add integration tests for Supabase query patterns
body:
9 tests covering RPC calls (find_stations_in_radius,
update_station_coordinates, bulk_update_regulated_price),
fuel_prices upsert conflict resolution, price_history queries,
and admin stations list queries. All use mocked supabase client.

Total test count: 45 (36 formatting + 9 integration).

Tags: testing, supabase, integration
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: testing
Semver: patch
